# occuralog — Synthetic WhatsApp Dataset v0.1
# Generated for testing and development purposes
# Labeled as SYNTHETIC — does not represent real individuals or companies
# Format: WhatsApp group export style
# Group: "Steel Ops - Production 🏭"
# Date range: January 2024 — June 2026
# Language: Mixed Urdu/Roman Urdu/English (as spoken in Pakistani factory ops groups)
# 150 messages
# ---

[1/8/2024, 9:02 AM] Tariq Usman: order 3201 ka material kab aayega? vendor ne kal bola tha aaj deliver hoga

[1/8/2024, 9:15 AM] Farhan Malik: bhai abhi truck Lahore mein hai. shayad shaam tak

[1/8/2024, 9:17 AM] Tariq Usman: shaam tak matlab 5 baje ya 8 baje? client wait kar raha hai

[1/8/2024, 9:20 AM] Farhan Malik: 6 baje tak confirm tha unhone. main dobara call karta hun

[1/8/2024, 10:45 AM] Ahmed Raza: production floor pe angle iron khatam ho gaya. order 3201 ruk jayega agar material nahi aaya

[1/8/2024, 11:03 AM] Farhan Malik: truck nikal gaya Lahore se. 4 ghante mein yahan hoga inshallah

[1/8/2024, 3:45 PM] Ahmed Raza: aa gaya bhai. unloading ho rahi hai

[1/8/2024, 3:47 PM] Tariq Usman: 👍

[2/14/2024, 8:30 AM] Zubair Khan: order 3310 — cutting complete. welding start ho gayi hai

[2/14/2024, 8:55 AM] Salman Butt: QC check kab hoga? inspector aaj available hai kal nahi

[2/14/2024, 9:10 AM] Zubair Khan: aaj 2 baje ke baad kar lo

[3/3/2024, 10:11 AM] Tariq Usman: vendor Hamza Steel ne price revise kiya hai. 15% increase. koi alternative hai?

# ---
# SYNTHETIC DATASET METADATA
# Total messages: 150
# Date range: January 8, 2024 — June 20, 2026
# Participants: Tariq Usman (Manager), Farhan Malik (Procurement), Ahmed Raza (Production Floor), Zubair Khan (Fabrication Lead), Salman Butt (QC/Admin)
# Order numbers: 3201 — 5700 (sequential, gaps intentional)
# Vendors: Hamza Steel, Al-Kareem Steel, Sindh Steel Traders
# Labeled events present: delivery_delay, material_shortage, quality_rejection, payment_delay, design_change, scope_creep, safety_incident, production_stoppage, dispatch_confirmation, vendor_change
# Language: Roman Urdu + English code-switching, as used in Pakistani industrial WhatsApp groups
# Use: Open-source testing and development only. Not derived from real communications.
